The Groww Mutual Fund App is a user-friendly and efficient investment platform that makes mutual fund investing simple for both beginners and experienced investors. With its clean interface, easy account setup, paperless KYC process, and access to a wide range of mutual funds, Groww helps users make informed investment decisions. The app provides transparent information, real-time portfolio tracking, insightful fund analysis, and seamless transactions, making wealth creation accessible and conve

Absolutely terrible trading app. The customer support is useless, the fees are unpredictable, and the app conveniently starts glitching right in the middle of trades. Every time there’s a chance to book profit, something suddenly stops working. It honestly feels like the platform is designed to make sure users never actually make money. And the worst part.. Their customer support somehow manages to make the whole experience even more frustrating.

As a beginner investor, I was shocked to learn about all the charges involved — brokerage, DP charges, STT, GST, exchange charges, and even short-term capital gains tax. Even if we make a small profit or sell at a loss, charges are still deducted. Feels unfair when we take all the risk with our own money.
